untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires visual identification of broadening formation and trend line geometry (multiple peaks/troughs expanding outward), which cannot be expressed with available indicators. Broadening wedge structure, trend line divergence, and corrective phase characteristics require multi-bar pattern analysis beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. Author silent on stop placement and profit targets prevents rule completion.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using low volume at start (volume < hvol_20) and price position relative to SMA as indicators of consolidation phase. Breakout signal approximated using Bollinger Band crossovers as trend line pierces. However, this is a significant simplification—actual broadening formation detection requires visual pattern recognition of expanding highs/lows, not available in indicator set.
